ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dwellings" (
  "dwelling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of dwellings */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the dwellings are located */,
  "num_dwellings" INTEGER /* Number of dwellings in the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "average_family_size" REAL /* Average family size in the area */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the dwellings were built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dwelling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dwellings_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the area is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the area is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "school_count" INTEGER /* Number of existing schools in the area */,
  "public_transportation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of public transportation in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pupil_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "dwelling_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dwelling record */,
  "num_pupils" REAL /* Total number of pupils in the area */,
  "pupils_per_year_group" REAL /* Estimated number of pupils per year group (based on 7% of the number of dwellings) */,
  "two_year_old_places" REAL /* Estimated number of 2-year-old places (32% eligibility) */,
  "three_year_old_places" REAL /* Estimated number of 3-year-old places (168% eligibility) */,
  "four_year_old_places" REAL /* Estimated number of 4-year-old places (168% eligibility, *2/3rds) */,
  "estimated_education_places" REAL /* Estimated total early education places required (15 hours) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the projection is made */,
  "eligibility_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the eligibility rate used for the projection */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education requirement used for the projection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_projections_dwelling_id FOREIGN KEY ("dwelling_id") REFERENCES dwellings ("dwelling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_projections_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES education_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_projections_eligibility_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("eligibility_rate_id") REFERENCES eligibility_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibility_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility rate */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the eligibility rate (e.g., 2-year-olds, 3-year-olds, 4-year-olds) */,
  "eligibility_rate" REAL /* Eligibility rate for the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education requirement */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the requirement (e.g., 2-year-olds, 3-year-olds, 4-year-olds) */,
  "required_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours of early education required */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, administrator, community service) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
